description_long: This object consists of three pieces of sushi artfully arranged on a rectangular wooden serving board. The sushi selection includes a salmon nigiri with a thick slice of salmon draped over a bed of white rice, a gunkan-maki topped with bright orange salmon roe and wrapped in a dark green seaweed strip, and a tamago nigiri featuring a yellow egg omelette secured to rice with a strip of nori. The wooden board has a natural, polished finish and is slightly elevated on four short legs. The sushi pieces display realistic textures, with the salmon showing marbled white lines, the roe appearing glossy and translucent, and the tamago having a soft, layered look. The overall presentation is clean and inviting, typical of a sushi platter served in restaurants or at food stalls.
description: A wooden board holds three sushi pieces: salmon nigiri, salmon roe gunkan-maki, and tamago nigiri, each with realistic textures and vibrant colors.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tamago nigiri with its nori strip most prominently, with the salmon nigiri and gunkan-maki partially visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view displays all three sushi pieces clearly: tamago nigiri on the left, gunkan-maki with orange roe in the center, and salmon nigiri on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the salmon nigiri in the foreground, with the gunkan-maki and tamago nigiri behind it.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the salmon nigiri on the left, gunkan-maki in the center, and tamago nigiri on the right.
